# Remove a voter, then add it back.
# Two sequential simple changes; the config returns to the original voter set.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=r3
----
voters=(1 2) learners=() auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=v3
----
voters=(1 2 3) learners=() auto-leave=false
